sentences.english: My biggest pet peeve is when people chew with their mouth open.
sentences.korean: 가장 짜증나는 것은 입을 벌리고 씹는 사람이에요.

sentences.english: I can't stand it when people are late.
sentences.korean: 사람들이 늦는 게 참을 수 없어요.

sentences.english: If we agree on a time, you should be there.
People who talk loudly on their phone in public, that really bothers me.
sentences.korean: 공공장소에서 전화를 크게 하는 사람, 정말 짜증나요.

sentences.english: Nobody wants to hear your conversation.
sentences.korean: 아무도 당신의 대화를 듣고 싶어 하지 않아요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
